targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (increase(${prefix}run_query_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (increase(${prefix}tx_total_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation"}[$__range])))

(sum(increase({__name__="${prefix}tx_error_rate.total", condition="nonzero", service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) / clamp_min(sum(increase({__name__="${prefix}tx_error_rate.total", service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation"}[$__range])), 1e-9)

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(${prefix}tx_total_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le) (rate(${prefix}tx_total_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(${prefix}tx_total_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(${prefix}run_query_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le) (rate(${prefix}run_query_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(${prefix}run_query_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type"}[$__rate_interval])))

topk(10, quantile_over_time(0.01, sum by (tx_name) (rate(${prefix}tx_count{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation", tx_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))[$__range:]))

topk(10, quantile_over_time(0.05, sum by (tx_name) (rate(${prefix}tx_count{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation", tx_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))[$__range:]))

topk(10, quantile_over_time(0.10, sum by (tx_name) (rate(${prefix}tx_count{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation", tx_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))[$__range:]))

topk(10, sum by (tx_name) (increase(${prefix}tx_count{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation", tx_name!=""}[$__range])) / $__range_s)

topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le, tx_name) (increase(${prefix}tx_total_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation", tx_name!=""}[$__range]))))

topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le, tx_name) (increase(${prefix}tx_queries_per_tx_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation", tx_name!=""}[$__range]))))

sum by (tx_name) (rate(${prefix}tx_count{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation", tx_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (tx_action) (rate(${prefix}tx_count{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", tx_name=~"$tx_name", tx_action=~"$tx_action", tx_isolation=~"$tx_isolation"}[$__rate_interval]))

topk(20, sum by (name) (increase(${prefix}run_query_count{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type", name=~"$query_name", name!="", type=~"$query_type"}[$__range])) / $__range_s)

topk(20, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, name) (increase(${prefix}run_query_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type", name=~"$query_name", name!="", type=~"$query_type"}[$__range]))))

topk(20, histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, name) (increase(${prefix}run_query_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type", name=~"$query_name", name!="", type=~"$query_type"}[$__range]))))
sum by (type) (rate(${prefix}run_query_count{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type", type!=""}[$__rate_interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by (le, type) (rate(${prefix}run_query_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type", type!=""}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, type) (rate(${prefix}run_query_duration_bucket{service.name=~"$job", scenario=~"$scenario", step=~"$step", name=~"$query_name", type=~"$query_type", type!=""}[$__rate_interval])))

(sum by (table_name) (max_over_time({__name__="${prefix}insert_error_rate.total", condition="nonzero", service.name=~"$job", table_name=~"$table_name"}[$__range])) or sum by (table_name) (max_over_time({__name__="${prefix}insert_error_rate.total", service.name=~"$job", table_name=~"$table_name"}[$__range])) * 0) / clamp_min(sum by (table_name) (max_over_time({__name__="${prefix}insert_error_rate.total", service.name=~"$job", table_name=~"$table_name"}[$__range])), 1e-9)
